name: Sunderland Central

locations.address: Sunderland Central Police Office Sunderland Community Fire Station Railway Row Sunderland  SR1 3HE

description: Sunderland has extensive, well-established residential communities and business districts, including the Nissan complex. We have police bases in Washington, Southwick, the city centre, Farringdon and Houghton-le-Spring. The Area Command is also home to our Mounted Unit.
